ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "cd" TEXT /* Customs Duty rate */,
  "sd" TEXT /* Special Duty rate */,
  "vat" TEXT /* Value Added Tax rate */,
  "ait" TEXT /* Additional Import Tax rate */,
  "rd" TEXT /* Regulatory Duty rate */,
  "at" TEXT /* Ad Valorem Tax rate */,
  "tti" TEXT /* Total Taxable Imports rate */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the commodity */,
  "trade_category" TEXT /* Category of trade (e.g., import, export) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the commodity (e.g., kg, liters) */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariff_codes" (
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the HS code */,
  "chapter" TEXT /* Chapter of the HS code */,
  "heading" TEXT /* Heading of the HS code */,
  "subheading" TEXT /* Subheading of the HS code */,
  "hscode_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the HS Code */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the HS Code was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the HS Code (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_duties" (
  "cd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customs duty */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Customs Duty rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customs duty */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the customs duty rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customs duty rate expires */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the customs duty is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customs_duties_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_duties" (
  "sd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the special duty */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Special Duty rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the special duty */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the special duty rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the special duty rate expires */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the special duty is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_duties_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_added_taxes" (
  "vat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the VAT */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "rate" TEXT /* VAT rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the VAT */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the VAT rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the VAT rate expires */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the VAT is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_added_taxes_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_import_taxes" (
  "ait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AIT */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "rate" TEXT /* AIT rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AIT */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the AIT rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the AIT rate expires */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the AIT is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_import_taxes_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_duties" (
  "rd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the RD */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "rate" TEXT /* RD rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the RD */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the RD rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the RD rate expires */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the RD is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_duties_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_valorem_taxes" (
  "at_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the AT */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "rate" TEXT /* AT rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AT */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the AT rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the AT rate expires */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the AT is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("at_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_valorem_taxes_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_taxable_imports" (
  "tti_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the TTI */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "rate" TEXT /* TTI rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TTI */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the TTI rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the TTI rate expires */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the TTI is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tti_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_taxable_imports_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trade policy */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the trade policy */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the trade policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of trade policy (e.g., tariff, quota) */,
  "policy_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trade policy */,
  "country_of_application" TEXT /* Country where the policy is applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_policies_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the business entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the business entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the business entity */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the business entity */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., importer, exporter) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the business entity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the business entity (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trade transaction */,
  "hscode" TEXT /* Harmonized System Code for the commodity */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business entity involved in the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the commodity traded */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the trade transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., import, export) */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the transaction */,
  "destination_country" TEXT /* Destination country for the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES business_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_hscode FOREIGN KEY ("hscode") REFERENCES commodities ("hscode")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "tax_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tax record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade transaction */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax paid (e.g., VAT, AIT) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax paid */,
  "tax_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax was paid */,
  "tax_reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the tax payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of tax payment (e.g., bank transfer, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES trade_transactions ("transaction_id")
)
